text_block_list.text:
It's a calm mid-February afternoon, and I'm
dozing off under the sun's warm light.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Happy Valentine's Day, Trainer.

Mihono Bourbon gives me some Valentine's Day
chocolates!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Based on your expression, I detect "surprise" from
you. May I ask why?

I never would've thought that the ever-serious
Mihono Bourbon would take note of something
like Valentine's Day.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My mother and I used to give a gift to my father
every year. Valentine's Day is a tradition in my
family.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Now then, I will take my leave.

She went through the trouble of getting me the
present, so I want to thank her properly. I hurry
and open the package...

And find chocolates that have been individually
wrapped with great care.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The chocolate shop had so many varieties that
coming to a decision proved difficult.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I made my selections based on a wide array of
data, including your current circumstances,
tastes, and the level of humidity.
choice_data_list: What kind of chocolates are they?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I prepared a selection of chocolates with high
cocoa content and a low glycemic index. The
blending ratio is seventy-two percent, and the
sweetness level is "mild."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
They're said to provide various benefits, including
lowering blood pressure, beautification, and
boosting cognitive function.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
They also contain caffeine, which is helpful in
keeping you alert on sleepy afternoons.

I eat one and a mild sweetness spreads
throughout my mouth. Somehow, I feel more
energized.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Uh, I... You are very welcome, Trainer.

I make smooth progress in my work in the
afternoon!
There are several heart-shaped chocolates inside.

I take a bite, and a gentle, bittersweet flavor fills
my mouth.

It tastes a little different from something you'd
buy from a store, and I notice a slight grainy
texture on my tongue.
choice_data_list: Wait, did you make these yourself?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Correct. They are handmade.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I intended to purchase premade chocolates, but
search results showed that the handmade variety
would provide greater happiness to the recipient.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I started with raw cacao beans because I
was very particular about the extent to which
these chocolates were made by hand.
choice_data_list: You made them completely from scratch?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. My original intention was to start by
planting the seeds...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But apparently they take four years from planting
to harvest, so I abandoned that idea.
choice_data_list: That sounds like a lot of work...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I was quite confident in my physical abilities,
but...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The process of "conching," in which the chocolate
is stirred manually for seventy-two hours, was
somewhat difficult.

Looking more closely, I can see that Mihono
Bourbon is somewhat exhausted.

I feel an even greater level of appreciation for
the chocolates she gave me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Is that so?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: In that case... I feel... "elated."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: No, it's fine. They're all for you.
Grooooowl...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Stomach contractions due to hunger have been
detected. It appears that I have not eaten
anything in seventy-two hours.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: B-but I made them for you to eat...

Though she is being surprisingly difficult about it,
I eventually manage to convince Mihono Bourbon
to share the treats with me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Status—"extremely satisfied!".
